title: STAMPED: AYA x Friends – Amapiano, Afrobeats & More
description: Sunday afternoon/evening Afrobeat and Amapiano session with @MANLIKEAYA and friends. Great laid-back Caribbean and African music vibes — perfect for a Sunday date that starts afternoon and rolls into the evening. Walk in, grab a drink, and enjoy the sounds.

title: The Black Keys: PEACHES 'N KREAM
description: Dan Auerbach and Patrick Carney bring their PEACHES 'N KREAM tour to Tabernacle. Raw blues-rock energy in an intimate venue — one of the best live music experiences in Atlanta. Splurge-worthy date night: grab dinner nearby before and make it a full evening. All ages.

title: Bachata X Zouk ATL Weekender 2026
description: Three-day bachata and zouk dance festival with workshops, social dances, and performances. Ideal for couples who want to learn together or show off their moves. Atlanta's premier Latin dance weekend — great excuse to travel to the city and immerse in dance culture.

title: Veg Week Kickoff Party
description: Kick off Atlanta Veg Week at this free-to-attend party celebrating plant-powered eating. Meet local vegan food creators, sample goods, and connect with the vegan community. Budget-friendly, educational, and delicious — great for couples exploring food together.

title: Illumine 2026 at Oakland Cemetery
location: Historic Oakland Cemetery, 248 Oakland Ave SE, Atlanta
description: The 19th annual illuminated art experience transforms Atlanta's historic Oakland Cemetery into a nighttime wonderland of colorful light installations and art by local innovators. Stroll hand-in-hand through beautifully lit pathways. One of Atlanta's most romantic and unique date ideas. Tonight is the last night.

title: Atlanta Jazz Festival 2026
description: The 49th Annual Atlanta Jazz Festival returns to Piedmont Park — one of the nation's largest FREE jazz festivals. Three days of world-class jazz in a gorgeous outdoor setting. Pack a picnic, bring a blanket, and enjoy music under the open sky. A classic Atlanta date for Memorial Day weekend.

title: Florence + The Machine – Everybody Scream Tour
location: State Farm Arena, 191 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Florence Welch delivers a breathtaking live spectacle at State Farm Arena — soaring vocals, theatrical staging, and anthems like 'Dog Days Are Over' and 'Shallow.' Make it a special occasion: dress up, grab dinner downtown before, and experience one of music's most powerful live performers. Big date night energy.

title: Disclosure Live – Two Nights at The Eastern
location: The Eastern, 800 Old Flat Shoals Rd SE, Atlanta
description: British electronic duo Disclosure performs two nights at The Eastern. Their live house music set is a masterclass in groove — expect 'Latch,' 'You Know How to Love Me,' and more. Intimate venue, incredible sound, and couples who love to dance will not be disappointed.

title: The 40th Annual Sweet Auburn Springfest
time: Sat May 9: 11 AM – Sun May 10: 9 PM
description: Atlanta's largest street festival returns for its 40th year celebrating the historic Sweet Auburn neighborhood. Live music, food vendors, community events, and cultural programming. Saturday daytime is ideal for a fun, high-energy couple outing — great food, great music, great vibes.

title: Helium Comedy Club – Rachel Williams
location: Helium Comedy Club, 115 E College Ave, Atlanta
description: Rachel Williams headlines Helium Comedy Club for a week of stand-up shows. Combine with dinner at one of College Ave's great restaurants for the perfect comedy date night. Helium is Atlanta's go-to for quality live comedy in a relaxed, intimate setting. Shows May 7 (Thursday), May 8 (Friday), May 9 (Saturday).

title: Caribbean Heat – Memorial Weekend Day Party
description: Island vibes day party with DJ Reese spinning Caribbean hits on a rooftop/atmosphere venue. Memorial Day weekend kickoff, 4–10PM — the perfect afternoon date. Come for the island energy, stay for the vibes. Great for couples wanting Caribbean culture without leaving Atlanta.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend ATL – 100% Reggae Afrobeats Soca
description: Memorial Weekend blowout at Underground Atlanta featuring 100% reggae, Afrobeats, and Soca. One of Atlanta's premier Caribbean music events. Dancing till 4AM — bring your partner and dress to impress. A high-energy late-night date for couples who love to move.

title: Atlanta Veg Week 2026
description: A citywide celebration of plant-powered eating. Atlanta Veg Week brings together restaurants, chefs, and community members to celebrate climate-friendly, delicious food. Couples can explore vegan menu deals atparticipating restaurants all week — great for foodies who want to eat well and feel good.

title: Open Studios at Atlanta Contemporary
location: Atlanta Contemporary, 724 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Monthly open studios event at Atlanta Contemporary — meet working artists in their studios, see works in progress, and explore one of Atlanta's leading contemporary art spaces. Great cultural date: stroll through the building together, discover something unexpected, and inspire each other.
